data.title: Kearny Financial’s Stability at Risk: Supply Chain Disruptions and Federal Funding Changes Loom
data.description:
Kearny Financial (KRNY) has disclosed a new risk, in the Supply Chain category.

Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Kearny Financial faces significant risks due to potential disruptions in their customers’ supply chains and changes in federal funding. Such disruptions, whether from third-party service interruptions, trade restrictions, natural disasters, or political conflicts, could severely impact customers’ business operations and their ability to repay loans. Additionally, alterations in federal funding, including workforce reductions, may lead to increased unemployment, affecting loan demand and repayment capabilities. These factors collectively pose a threat to the financial stability and operational continuity of Kearny Financial’s clientele, thereby impacting the company’s financial health.

The average KRNY stock price target is $7.25, implying 11.88% upside potential.

To learn more about Kearny Financial’s risk factors, click here.

data.title: NTPC Green Energy Expands Solar Capacity with New 50 MW Addition
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

NTPC Limited ( (IN:NTPC) ) has issued an update.

NTPC Limited announced that its subsidiary, NTPC Green Energy Limited, has declared the commercial operation of a 50 MW solar capacity in Bhuj, Gujarat, as of August 24, 2025. This addition increases the total installed capacity of NTPC Green Energy Limited Group to 7247.575 MW and the overall NTPC group’s capacity to 83,341 MW, marking a significant step in the company’s renewable energy expansion strategy.

More about NTPC Limited

NTPC Limited operates in the energy sector, primarily focusing on the generation of electricity. The company is involved in various energy projects, including thermal, hydro, and renewable energy sources, with a significant emphasis on expanding its renewable energy capacity through its subsidiary, NTPC Green Energy Limited.

Average Trading Volume: 2,177,464

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: 3285.7B INR

data.description:

Adani Enterprises Limited ( (IN:ADANIENT) ) has issued an announcement.

Adani Enterprises Limited has announced the incorporation of a new wholly-owned subsidiary, CG Syn-Gas & Chemicals Limited, under its existing subsidiary, Mundra Synenergy Limited. This move marks an expansion into the chemical manufacturing industry, although the new entity has yet to commence operations. The establishment of this subsidiary reflects Adani’s strategic interest in diversifying its portfolio and strengthening its position in the chemical sector, potentially impacting its market presence and offering new opportunities for stakeholders.

More about Adani Enterprises Limited

Adani Enterprises Limited is a prominent player in the infrastructure and energy sectors, with a focus on developing and operating projects in areas such as coal mining, power generation, and gas distribution. data.title: Goldgroup Revises Private Placement Terms to Fund Strategic Acquisitions
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Goldgroup Mining ( (TSE:GGA) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Goldgroup Mining Inc. has revised the terms of its non-brokered private placement, now offering up to 5,000,000 units at $0.80 per unit, with each unit comprising one common share and one full common share purchase warrant. The proceeds from this placement will be used to assess and pursue acquisition opportunities in the mining sector, aiming to enhance shareholder value by acquiring promising mining assets. However, the company cautions that it has not yet moved beyond the due diligence stage in its search for suitable projects.

More about Goldgroup Mining

Goldgroup is a Canadian-based mining company that owns and operates the Cerro Prieto heap-leach gold mine in Sonora, Mexico. The company is led by a team with extensive expertise in mine development, corporate finance, and exploration in Mexico.

data.description:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

NIIT Learning Systems Ltd ( (IN:NIITMTS) ) has provided an update.

NIIT Learning Systems Limited has announced its 23rd Annual General Meeting (AGM) scheduled for September 24, 2025, to be conducted via video conferencing. The company will facilitate remote e-voting for shareholders and has appointed a scrutinizer to ensure the voting process’s transparency. Additionally, a dividend of Rs. 3.00 per equity share for the financial year 2024-25 has been recommended, subject to approval at the AGM.

More about NIIT Learning Systems Ltd

NIIT Learning Systems Limited operates in the managed training services industry, focusing on providing comprehensive training solutions. The company is based in Gurugram, Haryana, India, and is known for its expertise in delivering training services to various sectors.

data.title: IDEX Biometrics Concludes Private Placement, Strengthening Leadership Stake
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

An update from IDEX Biometrics ( (IDXAF) ) is now available.

IDEX Biometrics ASA announced the completion of the second tranche of a private placement involving 4,813,857 shares at NOK 3.30 per share. Key stakeholders, including CEO and CFO Anders Storbråten and chair Morten Opstad, increased their shareholdings, with Mr. Storbråten and related entities now holding 13.81% of the company’s total shares. This move strengthens the leadership’s stake in the company, potentially impacting its strategic direction and market confidence.

More about IDEX Biometrics

IDEX Biometrics ASA is a global leader in fingerprint biometrics, providing authentication solutions for payments, access control, and digital identity. The company focuses on card-based applications, partnering with leading card manufacturers and technology firms to deliver secure and seamless user experiences.

data.title: Kamdhenu Limited Forfeits Warrants Due to Non-Conversion
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Kamdhenu Limited ( (IN:KAMDHENU) ) has issued an announcement.

Kamdhenu Limited has announced the forfeiture of 14,97,200 warrants due to the non-exercise of conversion rights by the allottees. The upfront amount of Rs. 13,21,27,900, which is 25% of the issue price received at the time of allotment, has also been forfeited. This decision, approved by the Board of Directors, reflects the company’s adherence to SEBI regulations and may impact the financial strategies of the involved stakeholders.
